footer.text: Made with paws, use at own risk

koans.empty-hint: The scroll is empty. Behold the wisdom of ages — or seek it yourself.
koans.error-network: The monastery is unreachable. Check your connection.
koans.error-not-found: This koan is not among the scrolls.
koans.error-generic: The scroll is unavailable. The master bids you wait and try again.
koans.toast-copied: Link copied — may it travel the networks

validation_errors.required: The void rejects emptiness — fill this field.
validation_errors.max_length: Too long for the parish scroll (max {{ requiredLength }} characters). Shorten it.
validation_errors.min_length: Your secret mantra is too short for initiation (at least {{ requiredLength }} characters).
validation_errors.email_pattern: This sigil doesn't look like email. Check the address.
validation_errors.password_pattern: Temple cipher: at least {{ minLength }} characters — one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit. Latin letters and digits only, no spaces.
validation_errors.password_confirmation: The mantras do not match — repeat the cipher exactly.
